title: Opinion: Opinion | A New Bill By 35 American Lawmakers Could Upend Indian Techies' Careers
summary_full: A group of Republicans wants to break the traditional F-1-to-H-1B-to-green-card path. The biggest casualty will be Indian students.
summary_public: A group of Republicans wants to break the traditional F-1-to-H-1B-to-green-card path. The biggest casualty will be Indian students.
